creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
The new seamonkey-2.16 is cradhing in page loading.


After typing the URL in the loakation bar and pressing enter the seamonkey is crashing.

It shows - for a part of a second - the title of the page in der tab, but then crashing.

How-To-Repeat: type any ULR in the loaction bar and type ENTER.
